name: You're the One Who Should Disappear (Reprint)
effect_text: [Counter] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle.[Trigger] If you have 0 Life cards, you may add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards. Then, trash 1 card from your hand.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
